title: Shrimati Pujniya Devki Devi Agnihotri ji ka Wiwah vishyak Raupak Jublilee Utsav
gloss: A pamphlet written in honour of the Silver Jubilee of Shrimati Devki Devi, the wife of the founder of the Dev Samaj, Lahore, containing also her biography.
notes: Dev Samaj founder's wife honored — female biography in sect literature. Section header misprinted 'MISCELLAGEOUS'.

title: Arya Gayan Pustak
gloss: A collection of religious songs of the Arya Samaj.
notes: HINDI—POETRY serials continue the 1910 sequence (20 ff.). 486-page Arya Samaj hymnal.

author: Bhagwati, Mai
title: Istri Bhajan
gloss: A collection of hymns from the Sikh Grantha for women.
notes: Female author (Mai Bhagwati); Sikh scripture hymns for women in Hindi, 8th edition.

title: Dan Lila
gloss: The well known story of Sri Krishna and the milk maids of Brindaban.

author: Jiwa Nand, P.
title: Wadi tatha Chhoti Khatt
gloss: Verses in praise of the bride and of the utensils and dresses given to the bridegroom, sung on the occasion of marriage by certain sections of the Hiudu community.
notes: Wedding-song (khatt/dowry inventory verse) tradition in print.

author: Tulsi Das
title: Hanuman Chalisa
gloss: The well known verses of Tulsi Das invoking the God Hanuman of Ramayana fame for help.

author: Sant Ram, P.
title: Shudh Ramayan, Dusra Bhag
gloss: The well known ancient story of Rama, believed by the Hindus to be an incarnation of Vishnu.
notes: Previous part noticed in entry No. 7 at page 7 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 30th September, 1910. Nagari Pracharni Company — Hindi-movement publisher. Ink stamp over entry: 'Rejected' with date stamp 'JUN 1917' — library de-accession trace.
marks: X; ink stamps 'Rejected' and 'JUN 1917' across entry

title: Be Nazir Urdu Bhagwat Gita
gloss: A translation into Hindi of the Sanskrit philosophical poem "Shrimad Bhagwad Gita by P. Devi Datt, Bhera.
notes: Gita in Persian script ('Be Nazir Urdu Bhagwat Gita') — classified as Hindi in Persian character; catalog prints '1st editin'.
